description: Balanced scoring across persistence harm reduction lock-in reduction equity transformation ecological integrity burden shifting and implementation burden.
Prioritizes persistence and continuity while still penalizing burden shifting.
Prioritizes strategies that reduce harm rather than merely preserve system function.
Prioritizes transformation capacity and structural redesign.
Prioritizes distributional justice and reduction of unequal vulnerability.
Prioritizes ecological integrity and social-ecological repair.
Strongly penalizes strategies that shift cost risk labor displacement pollution or ecological harm onto others.
Penalizes high implementation burden where capacity sequencing or public finance are constrained.
